name: Codenames: Duet
description: Codenames: Duet is the cooperative two-player (or two-team) variant of the original — both players see one half of a shared key card, take turns giving one-word clues to identify each other's secret words, and must locate every agent before time or the assassin gets them. Includes a campaign mode of progressively tougher missions. Tighter, kinder, just as devious.
